Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot for Northern Trust Co.

Mr. Lanctot addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to the unusual amount/number of sales and purchases of shares for a fiduciary account. The Court approved the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). A bi-annual accounting date will be reflected in the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
